result.finding: Java 8 (JRE) via Eclipse Temurin (eclipse-temurin:8-jre). Spring Boot 2.7.18 application packaged as a fat JAR, running with JVM options -Xmx512m -Xms256m.
evidence: Dockerfile final stage: FROM eclipse-temurin:8-jre (Java 8 JRE runtime)
Dockerfile build stage: FROM maven:3.9.6-eclipse-temurin-8 (Maven 3.9.6 + Java 8 build tool)
Spring Boot fat JAR entrypoint: java $JAVA_OPTS -jar app.jar
values: Deployment: Fat JAR (Spring Boot Maven Plugin)
